name: Phase N11 E2E Dry Run Workflow

value.creative_brief: A modern co-working space banner with glassmorphism effects

parameters.jsCode:
const original = $node["Code: Normalize Event"].json;

      "module_id": "n8n_event_router",

      "retryable": false,
      "attempt": 1,
      "max_attempts": 1,
      "next_action": "stop",
      "timestamp": new Date().toISOString(),
      "source": "n8n_n11_e2e_dry_run_mock",

      }
    },
    "execution_trace": [

      "routing_aborted",
      "error_callback_preview_generated"

    "source": "n8n_n11_e2e_dry_run_mock",
    "generated_at": new Date().toISOString(),
    "notes": `Unsupported event route configuration: ${original.event_type}`
  }
}];
